title: Spanish Paella with Sweetcorn
description: A delicious and traditional Spanish dish featuring sautéed ingredients and a flavorful paella rice. Serve with a side of garlic bread or a green salad for a well-rounded meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sweetcorn kernels and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the paella rice and stir to combine with the vegetables and spices.
Add the diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, and salt. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the paella from the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges and fresh parsley, if desired.
